main.description: Record a graduated-action moderation event against a subject (account or record). Computes the strike value at action time per the operator's [strike_policy] and [moderation_reasons] config (frozen for forensic history); inserts the subject_actions row, updates the strike_state cache, and writes a hash-chained audit_log row in a single transaction (§F20).

subject.description: DID (`did:plc:…`, `did:web:…`) or `at://`-URI of the subject. URIs auto-route to subject_uri with the parent repo DID as subject_did; bare DIDs route to subject_did with subject_uri = NULL.

type.description: Graduated-action category. Warning/note carry zero strikes; temp_suspension requires `duration`; indef_suspension/takedown reject `duration`.

reasons.description: One or more reason identifiers from the operator's [moderation_reasons] vocabulary. Multi-reason: severe wins for strike calculation; otherwise highest base_weight wins.

duration.description: ISO-8601 duration (e.g. `P7D`). Required for `temp_suspension`; rejected for other types.

note.description: Optional moderator-facing rationale stored on the subject_actions row.

reportIds.description: Optional report row ids that motivated this action.

actionId.description: Primary key of the inserted subject_actions row.

strikeValueBase.description: Reason's base_weight before dampening (highest among declared reasons; 0 for warning/note).

strikeValueApplied.description: Strike weight actually added to the subject's count after dampening.

wasDampened.description: True iff the dampening curve was consulted (in good standing, position covered, non-severe).

strikesAtTimeOfAction.description: Subject's current strike count BEFORE this action — frozen for forensic history.

errors.name: InvalidReason
errors.description: One or more reason identifiers are not declared in the operator's [moderation_reasons] vocabulary.

errors.name: InvalidActionType
errors.description: The `type` value is not one of the five graduated-action categories.

errors.name: DurationRequired
errors.description: `type` is `temp_suspension` but `duration` is absent or empty.

errors.name: SubjectUriMismatch
errors.description: `subject` is an at:// URI whose repo DID does not match a separate subject_did context (reserved for future use; v1.4 derives subject_did from the URI directly).
